finding_results.notes: Replaced summary-only reading narration with three direct manuscript excerpts (each 3+ sentences) carrying documentary and bodily specificity, and tied immediate room response to explicit quoted lines.
Opening now explicitly anchors Marisol in a Sunset Park sublet and ties the remaining arrears to that sublet; outbound transit path to the Prospect-Lefferts reading is coherent from that origin.
Q&A now includes a direct hostile paternity/legal-strategy challenge and an immediate negative consequence (walkout, public accusation, and live reputational escalation in-room).

summary: Chapter 18 now resolves all pass findings by restoring on-page textual specificity at the reading climax, repairing Sunset Park geography/debt continuity, and introducing costly public-stakes conflict in Q&A tied to suppressed paternity boundaries.
